rulings.Case Title: GARY PASQUINELLI et al VS. NORA A. YEGEHYAIAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 22, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANT NORA YEGHYAIAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues: Continued to September 8, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the Notice of Errata filed on August 18, 2014. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOCHI TA VS. LOUIS KIRTMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 22, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT: Continued to September 25, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than august 29, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 345 SIXTH STREET LLC VS. WOODBANK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 22, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANT WOODBANK, INC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with 10 day leave to amend. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 703 MARKET STREET (SF) OWNER, LLC VS. WAUKEEN MCCOY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 22, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT WAUKEEN MCCOY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: GRANTED, non-opposition filed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALFONSO PORTILLO, TRUSTEE OF THE ALFONSO PORTILLO VS. TINA SUY TROUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 22, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT CLAUDIA ROJAS' MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT: Motion to Strike Portions of Second Amended Compliant, i.e. "Premises and said sum of unpaid rent" is GRANTED. Saberi v. Bakhtiari (1985) 169 Cal.App.3d 509 (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK PALADINI VS. TREVOR WALKER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motionand Motion To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 22, 2014, Line 6: PLAINTIFF MARK PALADINI's Motion To Amend Complaint: DENIED. Moving party failed to show that the cause of action for habitual late payment was omitted from original complaint due to mistake or inadvertence as such cause of action has not yet accrued as of May 15, 2014. No motion for leave to file a supplemental complaint was made. Amended will be prejudicial to defendant in light of September 2, 2014 trial, providing defendants 5 days before the discovery cut-off to file and serve their answer, propound and receive discovery responses. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRAZIL INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. RAMNI LEVY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 22, 2014, Line 7: PLAINTIFF BRAZIL INVESTMENTS' Motion Compel Responses To Discovery: GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide responses to Special Interrogatories without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $945. (501/REQ)
